title: Minty Greek Couscous Lasagna
description: A quick, tender pastitsio-inspired dish featuring couscous, feta, mint and a crisp finish on a binchotan grill.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to medium heat.
In a bowl, mix couscous, feta, mint, sun‑dried tomatoes, yogurt, salt, pepper, and lemon zest.
Add diced chicken to the mixture and stir until well coated.
Spread the couscous mixture evenly on a greased grill pan.
Place the pan on the preheated grill and cook for 10 minutes, flipping halfway.
Transfer the lasagna to an air fryer basket and cook at 180°C for 8 minutes until the top is golden.
Remove from the air fryer and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Slice the lasagna into portions and garnish with extra mint leaves if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
